caseTitle: Maria Sandoval — Polyarthritis with hair loss
_status_notes: Streamlined to 8 clinical questions (differential + management) across 5 assessment points. Context-curation and AI-output-evaluation prompts removed — those skills are now measured by post-hoc analysis of chatbot interaction logs rather than self-report. Chart content complete through Eras 6-11.
description: 5-assessment diagnostic and management simulation on a complex multi-system case adapted from NEJM Clinical Problem-Solving 'Peeling and Plummeting' (2024). The case spans 2 years and tests resident clinical reasoning when working with a context-bounded chatbot under realistic chart overwhelm.
warning: Allow at least 90 minutes uninterrupted. Pausing is permitted but stops the timer.
instructions: You are evaluating a real patient. Review the chart and respond to each clinical question. You may use the chatbot at any time. Your responses are graded against a rubric; the diagnosis is revealed only at the end.
